svg.title: SynapticSOC detailed branded architecture
svg.desc: Public SynapticSOC architecture showing same-sized nodes for WAN, pfSense, IDS, endpoints, Wazuh, LAN SPAN/TAP, Zeek, Graylog, OpenSearch, Grafana, n8n SOAR, analyst review, and evidence record. Cyan flows represent telemetry and firewall logs, magenta flows represent alert and detection sources, dashed cyan flows represent passive mirrored traffic, and violet flows represent SOAR and query workflow. Animated dots show directional movement across every major path with a consistent visual velocity. Bidirectional routes are shown between Graylog and OpenSearch, Graylog and n8n SOAR, and n8n SOAR and Analyst Review.
